main.description: Commit an MLS group change (add members, process external commit, rejoin, readdition, or manage pending device additions)

memberDids.description: DIDs of members to add (for addMembers action)

idempotencyKey.description: Client-generated UUID for idempotent request retries

pendingAdditionId.description: ID of the pending addition to claim (for claimPending action)

keyPackageHashes.description: Array of {did, hash} objects mapping each member to their key package hash. Required for multi-device support.

success.description: Whether the group change was successfully committed

newEpoch.description: New epoch number after the change

confirmationTag.description: Base64 encoded confirmation tag from the commit

claimedAddition.description: Details of the claimed pending addition (for claimPending action)

pendingAdditions.description: List of pending device additions (for listPending action)

rejoinedAt.description: Timestamp when the rejoin was processed

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: User does not have permission for this action

errors.name: NotMember
errors.description: User is not a member of this conversation

errors.name: AlreadyMember
errors.description: User is already a member of this conversation

errors.name: KeyPackageNotFound
errors.description: Key package not found for one or more members

errors.name: TooManyMembers
errors.description: Adding these members would exceed the maximum group size

errors.name: BlockedByMember
errors.description: Action blocked by a member's block list

errors.name: InvalidAction
errors.description: The specified action is not valid

errors.name: InvalidCommit
errors.description: The MLS commit message is invalid

errors.name: InvalidGroupInfo
errors.description: The MLS group info is invalid

errors.name: PendingAdditionNotFound
errors.description: The specified pending addition was not found

errors.name: PendingAdditionAlreadyClaimed
errors.description: The pending addition has already been claimed by another device

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: User is not authorized for this action

pendingDeviceAddition.description: A pending device addition waiting to be claimed and completed

id.description: Unique identifier for the pending addition

convoId.description: Conversation the device is being added to

userDid.description: User DID who owns the device

status.description: Current status of the pending addition

createdAt.description: When the pending addition was created

claimedBy.description: DID of the device that claimed this addition

keyPackageHashEntry.description: Maps a DID to the key package hash used for their Welcome message

hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 hash of the key package used
